free_text: Further measurements of the probability of alpha
cluster pre-formation by means of (p,alpha) reactions
Target thicknesses were from 300 to 400 ug/cm2.
The detector thickness was 400 um for the
measurements taken at incident-proton energies of
20 and 22.8 MeV and 700 um at 25 and 30 MeV.
The calibration of the energy scale was obtained by
means of the well-known peaks from 27Al(p,a)24Mg
corresponding to the ground state and the low
